description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the rays3t/sourcemod-plugins-builder-ci Docker image with a single stage named build. Define a build job that runs in the build stage and executes the commands: spcomp; mkdir -p package/addons/sourcemod/plugins; mkdir -p package/addons/sourcemod/scripting/include; cp compiled/*.smx package/addons/sourcemod/plugins; cp *.sp package/addons/sourcemod/scripting; cp include/*.inc package/addons/sourcemod/scripting/include; cp -r bundle/* package/; cd package && rm -rf *.md. The job should publish artifacts named ${CI_PROJECT_NAME}_${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME} containing the path package/*. No caching or conditional rules are required.
